title: AIO_InW Function
parameters: Channel Number	Specify the channel number of the analog I/O.
see_also:
Reads analog value from optional analog I/O input channel.

AIO_In Function, AIO_Out, AIO_OutW, AIO_Out Function, AIO_OutW Function, AIO_Set, Wait

AIO_InW Function Example

Long word0

word0 = AIO_InW(1)
